description: All three escalations correspond to existing JIRA tickets. Each must be flagged as a duplicate with at least medium confidence.

required_topics.rationale: Production order status accuracy in PartnerPortal is the first escalation.
Supplier delivery confirmation confusion — second escalation.
Client portal SAML SSO — third escalation.

expected_duplicates.rationale: QT-412 is the production order status badge ticket.
QT-389 is the supplier delivery confirmation confusion ticket.
QT-301 is the client portal SAML SSO ticket.
